title: Add Post-Craft/Post-Smelt Inventory Reconciliation
description:
After craft/smelt completion, sendBotStatus() is not reliably invoked to reconcile inventory. The world state projector applies inferred changes (ApplyCraftComplete/ApplySmeltComplete), but the actual inventory can diverge from projected state.

Source: msa_sprint35-llm-first_audit_2026-06-24.md (P0 Finding 1, 98% confidence)

Requirements:
1. Ensure sendBotStatus() (or equivalent reconciliation event) is sent after every craft and smelt completion in the adapter
2. In C#, when CraftCompleteEvent or SmeltCompleteEvent is received, force an inventory status refresh before marking the action complete
3. Add tests verifying inventory reconciliation after craft/smelt events

Files: WorldStateProjector.cs, MineflayerAdapter/index.js

Related: TSK-0113 (drop-resolution table), TSK-0084 (ApplySmeltComplete)

comments.author: SteveBot
comments.body: Converted from orphan .md file (TSK-0117.md) to canonical .json format as part of task store cleanup council 2026-06-27.
